title: Reflections snoitcelfeR
description:
What is this? Something feels wrong here...
[sine]...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW[/sine]
notes:
[gold]Touch a Mirror[/gold] downgrades up to 2 randomly selected cards that are already upgraded, and upgrades up to 4 randomly selected cards that are still upgradable. Fewer cards are affected if your deck doesn't have enough eligible cards in each category.

[gold]Shatter[/gold] duplicates every card currently in your deck (doubling its size) and adds [purple]Bad Luck[/purple] as a curse card.
